title: ML_LOG_LEVEL NO-DEFAULTS violation + over-age policy exception (masked by magic-constant test caps)

createdViaParent.expansionReason: active runtime exposes no runSubagent/agent tool; bugfix-fastlane is not a top-level-runtime-required mode, so each phase owner's work is executed inline by bubbles.workflow

summary: Spec 067's gaps + harden phases surfaced and routed two entangled findings at certification: GAP-067-G01 (the live-but-latent NO-DEFAULTS violation ml/app/main.py:22 os.environ.get('ML_LOG_LEVEL','INFO') kept legal only by the over-age exception G067-A05-ml-log-level, expires_on 2026-12-01 = 162 days vs the 90-day SST cap; nothing emits ML_LOG_LEVEL so the sidecar always uses the literal INFO) and GAP-067-G02 (every real-baseline policy guard test overrides ExceptionMaxAgeDays to 365*10/180 magic constants, masking G01, violating spec 067 Hard Constraint 2). This bug SST-ifies the fix: lands services.ml.log_level, wires ML_LOG_LEVEL emission into config generation, makes ml/app/main.py read it fail-loud, deletes the exception entirely, anchors the 4 real-baseline tests to the real SST cap, and lands an adversarial regression (TestRealBaselineHasNoOverAgeExceptionsAtRealCap + TestValidateExceptionFlagsOverAgeAtRealCap) proven RED->GREEN.

findingCategories.description: Live NO-DEFAULTS violation ml/app/main.py:22 (os.environ.get('ML_LOG_LEVEL','INFO')) kept legal only by over-age exception G067-A05-ml-log-level (162 d > 90 d cap); ML_LOG_LEVEL emitted by nothing so the sidecar always uses the literal INFO.
Real-baseline policy guard tests override ExceptionMaxAgeDays to 365*10/180 magic constants instead of the real 90-day SST cap, so the over-age exception never trips a gate (masks G01).

scopes.title: SST-ify ML_LOG_LEVEL + fail-loud sidecar + delete the policy exception
Close the magic-constant test hole + adversarial regression

executionHistory.expansionReason: Active runtime has no runSubagent/agent tool; bugfix-fastlane is not a top-level-runtime-required mode, so bubbles.workflow performed the bug/design/plan phases inline. Bug packet (8 artifacts) authored: bug.md, spec.md, design.md, scopes.md, report.md, uservalidation.md, scenario-manifest.json, state.json. Root cause grounded in spec 067 GAP-067-G01/G02 routed findings + directly-captured Before-Fix reproduction in report.md.
executionHistory.summary: Authored the full BUG-067-001 packet and captured the Before-Fix reproduction (over-age exception 162 d > 90 d cap; zero ML_LOG_LEVEL config emission; forbidden default ml/app/main.py:22; 4 magic-constant masking caps). Designed the SST-ify fix (land services.ml.log_level -> emit ML_LOG_LEVEL -> fail-loud read -> delete exception) + the test-hole fix (SST-anchored cap helper + 2 adversarial tests). Routed to inline implement.

Applied the SST-ify fix: config/smackerel.yaml services.ml.log_level:info; scripts/commands/config.sh ML_LOG_LEVEL extract + emit (single heredoc -> dev/test/bundle); ml/app/main.py fail-loud read (removed 2 policy-exception markers + the literal INFO default, added ML_LOG_LEVEL to required keys, allowlist + setLevel); policy-exception-baseline.json -> exceptions:[]. Closed the test hole: realPolicyExceptionMaxAgeDays helper reads the cap from config/smackerel.yaml; the 4 real-baseline caps anchored to it (no_defaults_python L26, no_defaults_go L26, keyword_map L43, keyword_routing L50). Wired ML_LOG_LEVEL into ml/tests/test_main.py + ml/tests/test_startup_warning.py so the now-required key does not short-circuit existing assertions. Verified config generation emits ML_LOG_LEVEL into dev.env (L379), test.env (L379), and the deploy bundle app.env (L378).

Adversarial regression proven RED->GREEN in the same session. RED (before fix, real 90-day cap): TestRealBaselineHasNoOverAgeExceptionsAtRealCap FAILED with G067-A07 for the still-present G067-A05-ml-log-level (expires_on=2026-12-01 > 90 d); the teeth test TestValidateExceptionFlagsOverAgeAtRealCap PASSED even at RED (non-tautological: 162-day fixture flagged G067-A07, 80-day fixture not flagged). GREEN (after fix): both adversarial tests + the 4 cap-anchored real-corpus tests all PASS at the real SST cap. Evidence in report.md Test Evidence section.

Broader regression GREEN on the surface this change touches: full policy-guard integration package go test -tags integration ./tests/integration/policy/... ok (0.842s); full ml sidecar Python unit suite ./smackerel.sh test unit --python = 517 passed, 2 skipped (the 3 startup_warning tests that initially broke on the new required ML_LOG_LEVEL were fixed by wiring the value into their _run_lifespan helper, not by weakening). Browser/live-stack E2E not applicable (zero runtime/UI surface); the operator constrained this run to avoid the full live stack on a memory-pressured host. No findings to route.

n/a with provenance. The realPolicyExceptionMaxAgeDays helper centralizes the cap read and removes 4 magic constants (a net simplification); the fail-loud read mirrors the existing SMACKEREL_ENV allowlist pattern in the same function; no abstraction or indirection introduced. Nothing to simplify further.

n/a with provenance. Bounded stability review: zero Docker/Compose/container-lifecycle/schema/NATS changes; one new required SST key (ML_LOG_LEVEL) emitted into every env + the deploy bundle (verified) so the fail-loud sidecar boots in all environments; no new persistent state; no shared-fixture coupling. Policy guards remain pure file-system scanners with zero runtime state.

SECURE / improvement. Removing the literal log-level default and making the read fail-loud strengthens the NO-DEFAULTS posture; the co-located /embed model field now reports the embedder real model name rather than an env echo. No secrets, hostnames, IPs, or PII added; no new attack surface; OWASP Top 10 not applicable (config + governance only).

Certification: ./smackerel.sh check = Config in sync with SST + env_file drift guard OK + scenario-lint OK; ./smackerel.sh lint = ruff All checks passed + go vet clean + web validation passed; gofmt -l on the 4 changed policy test files empty. artifact-lint on the bug packet + on the parent specs/067 both exit 0. format --check has one hit on a committed file outside this change set that this bug does not modify (internal/connector/qfdecisions/chaos_hardening_test.go). Both scope DoDs ticked with inline evidence; status promoted to done.

Verdict SHIP. G01 + G02 both closed at the root. Anti-fabrication: every checked DoD item maps to a real captured command; RED and GREEN captured same session against the same working tree; the adversarial case fails if the over-age exception or a widened cap is reintroduced. Change set isolated to the 6 source/config files + 4 policy test files + 1 Python test file + this bug packet; concurrent-session edits to specs/025|027|039|098 and docs/releases were not touched or staged. No NO-DEFAULTS fallback introduced (the fix removes one).

check + lint GREEN; SST drift guard OK; artifact-lint bug + parent exit 0; both scope DoDs ticked.
